scripts._install: echo "### Run Omnilint _install command. ###" && npx omnilint install
scripts.postinstall: echo "### Run Omnilint postinstall command. ###" && npm run _install -- node_modules/omnilint
scripts._uninstall: echo "### Run Omnilint _uninstall command. ###" && npx omnilint uninstall
scripts.preuninstall: echo "### Run Omnilint preuninstall command. ###" && npm run _uninstall -- node_modules/omnilint
scripts.devinstall: echo "### Run Omnilint devinstall command. ###" && npm run _install -- node_modules/omnilint
scripts._global_install: echo "### Run Omnilint _global_install command. ###" && omnilint install
